Title: Admin views approvals page with program filter
Preconditions: 1. Logged in as tachongrak@central.co.th (admin) 2. Backend running on port 3001 3. Frontend running on port 3307
Steps: 1. Navigate to /approvals page 2. Wait for page to load (waitForLoadState) 3. Verify heading contains 'Approvals' 4. Verify search input is visible 5. Call GET /approvals/pending API and verify response has pending array with programs field 6. If pending items have programs: verify Programs filter button is visible 7. Click Programs filter dropdown 8. Select first program from dropdown 9. Verify filter is applied (no crash) 10. Click Clear to reset filter
Expected Result: 1. Page loads with Approvals heading 2. Search input is visible 3. API returns 200 with pending array 4. Each pending item has programs array field 5. If programs exist: Programs filter button visible 6. Dropdown opens with program options 7. Filter applies without crash 8. Clear resets filter

Title: Search filter on approvals shows empty state for no-match query (NEGATIVE)
Preconditions: 1. Logged in as tachongrak@central.co.th (admin) 2. Approvals page accessible
Steps: 1. Navigate to /approvals 2. Wait for page to load 3. Find search input 4. Fill search input with 'zzz_absolutely_no_match_xyz_999' 5. Wait 800ms for debounce 6. Verify no rows match the search term 7. Clear the search input 8. Verify page still renders without crash
Expected Result: 1. Search input is visible 2. After filling nonsense search term: zero rows match 3. After clearing: page renders without crash

Title: Profile page shows avatar upload area
Preconditions: 1. Logged in as tachongrak@central.co.th (admin) 2. Profile page accessible at /profile
Steps: 1. Navigate to /profile 2. Wait for networkidle 3. Verify h2 heading is visible with user name 4. Verify Camera button (aria-label='Change photo') is visible 5. Verify hidden file input (input[type=file]) exists in DOM 6. Verify file input accept attribute contains 'image' 7. Call PUT /users/me/avatar with invalid URL 8. Verify response is not 404 (endpoint exists)
Expected Result: 1. Profile heading (h2) is visible 2. Camera button for avatar change is visible 3. File input (hidden) is present in DOM 4. File input accept attribute includes 'image' 5. Avatar PUT endpoint returns 400/422 (not 404) for invalid URL
Notes: IMPLEMENTATION BUG: profile/page.tsx getInitials() crashes — email[0].toUpperCase() when email is empty string at line 55. Page renders Runtime TypeError dialog instead of profile content.

Title: Profile page edit form cancel preserves original name
Preconditions: 1. Logged in as tachongrak@central.co.th (admin) 2. Profile page accessible
Steps: 1. Navigate to /profile 2. Wait for networkidle 3. Note the h2 heading text (original name) 4. Click 'Edit' button 5. Verify Full Name input appears with placeholder 'Your full name' 6. Clear the input and fill with 'Test Changed Name' 7. Click 'Cancel' button 8. Verify h2 heading still shows original name (not 'Test Changed Name')
Expected Result: 1. Profile heading visible with original name 2. Edit button visible and enabled 3. After click: form shows with Full Name input 4. After cancel: heading shows original name 5. 'Test Changed Name' NOT shown in heading
Notes: IMPLEMENTATION BUG: Same crash as TC-003 — page crashes before Edit button renders. Fix required in profile/page.tsx getInitials() function.

Title: PUT /users/me/avatar API validates URL format (NEGATIVE)
Preconditions: 1. Logged in as tachongrak@central.co.th (admin) 2. Backend running with avatar endpoint
Steps: 1. Navigate to /profile to establish session 2. Send PUT /users/me/avatar with body {avatarUrl: 'not-a-valid-url'} 3. Verify response status is 400 4. Verify response body has 'message' field 5. Send PUT /users/me/avatar with body {avatarUrl: 'https://example.com/valid-avatar.png'} 6. Verify response status is 200
Expected Result: 1. Invalid URL: response status 400 2. Response body has message field describing validation error 3. Valid HTTPS URL: response status 200
Test Data: User: tachongrak@central.co.th (admin) | Invalid URL: 'not-a-valid-url' | Valid URL: 'https://example.com/valid-avatar.png'
Notes: API validation test — independent of profile page UI crash
